name: Legend Biotech Corporation
description: Legend Biotech Corporation is a global, commercial-stage biotechnology company dedicated to the discovery, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of novel cell therapies. Headquartered in the Cayman Islands, the company focuses on creating cutting-edge treatments for oncology and other serious indications. By leveraging innovative technologies and a robust research pipeline, Legend Biotech aims to deliver transformative therapeutic options to patients worldwide. The company operates internationally, with significant research, development, and manufacturing capabilities across the United States, China, and Europe, positioning itself as a leader in the rapidly evolving field of advanced biopharmaceuticals.
